page: Microsoft Azure NV24s_v3 is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine belonging to the NVSv3 server family. Running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance features 24 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel processor. It is equipped with 224.0 GB of system memory, providing approximately 9.33 GB of RAM per core.

The hardware configuration includes two integrated GPUs and 1509 GB of local storage. Additionally, the instance is Premium Storage capable, allowing for high-performance external disk attachments, though it does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Given the dual GPU configuration and substantial memory allocation, this server is designed for GPU-accelerated workloads, visualization, and memory-intensive processing. The dedicated CPU allocation and local storage capacity offer a balanced resource density for workloads requiring parallel processing and local data caching without relying on shared-core resources.
description: Microsoft Azure NV24s_v3 is an x86_64 virtual machine within the NVSv3 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 24 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 224.0 GB of system memory, and two onboard GPUs. With 9.33 GB of RAM per core and dual GPU capabilities, this server is configured for GPU-accelerated applications, data visualization, and memory-intensive workloads requiring dedicated compute resources.
